title: Battleworn Dummy
description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

"[jitter]BZZZT![/jitter] TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE [blue]3 TURNS[/blue] TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE [red]LETHAL HUMILIATION[/red].
Here are the options:"

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Fight a [blue]{Setting1Hp}[/blue] HP dummy. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Fight a [blue]{Setting2Hp}[/blue] HP dummy. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Fight a [blue]{Setting3Hp}[/blue] HP dummy. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes:
A training encounter where you must defeat the selected dummy within [blue]3 turns[/blue]. Each setting has increasing difficulty and different rewards. Dummy HP scales based on player count and current act progression.

[gold]Setting 1:[/gold] Lowest difficulty. On victory: 1 random [gold]Potion[/gold] from your character's potion pool (or shared pool if character pool is empty).

[gold]Setting 2:[/gold] Medium difficulty. On victory: [blue]2[/blue] random upgradeable cards from your deck are upgraded (cards selected randomly, only upgradeable cards selected).

[gold]Setting 3:[/gold] Highest difficulty. On victory: 1 random [gold]Relic[/gold] from the relic pool (pulled from the front of the relic deck).

If you fail to defeat the dummy within the 3-turn limit, the event ends in defeat. You may continue your run regardless of victory or defeat.
